title: First and Emergency Aid Program Educational Objectives
content:
First and Emergency Aid Program Educational Objectives

Program Educational Objectives

1. To train healthcare personnel who can provide basic and advanced life support to patients and injured people during illness and accidents,

2. Can apply emergency medical interventions in all kinds of trauma and emergency situations,

3. Can ensure the safe transfer of patients and injured people to the hospital,

4. Can communicate effectively with other healthcare personnel and relevant people in emergency situations, are compatible with teamwork,

5. Can define problems related to their field and develop solution suggestions,

6. Contemporary, people-oriented,

7. Give priority to ethical principles,

8. Follow scientific and technological developments,

9. Informed and equipped.
